Beginning at the southwest corner of Lot 7 in the Maple Grove Subdivision; thence N 00°00'00" E, 120.00 feet; thence N 90°00'00" E, 100.00 feet; thence along a curve to the right having a radius of 250.00 feet, an arc length of 75.00 feet, and a chord bearing S 81°24'00" E, 74.50 feet; thence S 00°00'00" W, 110.00 feet; thence S 90°00'00" W, 173.00 feet to the point of beginning.
